layout_meta_description: Transcribr provides fast, accurate, and affordable audio and video transcription services. Our platform offers advanced AI transcription with manual human-led transcription coming soon, perfect for professionals, journalists, and students.
layout_jsonld_description: Transcribr provides fast, accurate, and affordable audio and video transcription services.
footer_tagline: Fast, accurate transcription with synchronized playback, speaker labels, and flexible export — built for professionals.
hero_subtitle: Lightning-fast transcripts with speaker labels, synced playback, and exports — so you can edit and share in seconds.
store_free_note: Free to start · No credit card required
howitworks_heading: From audio to finished transcript in three steps
howitworks_subtext: Built for meetings, interviews, court notes, and content — without the busywork.
howitworks_step1_desc: Drop an audio or video file, or paste a URL. MP3, MP4, WAV, and more — up to an hour per file.
howitworks_step2_desc: Choose Quick, Standard, or Premium. We detect language, chunk audio, identify speakers, and finalize your transcript.
howitworks_step3_desc: Tap any section to jump in the audio, rename speakers, polish the text, then export PDF, TXT, SRT, VTT, or CSV.
features_heading: Everything you need after the recording ends
features_subtext: Transcribe, edit, analyse, and export — with smart summaries, speaker labels, synced playback, and subtitle-ready exports.
features_teaser_1_desc: Quick, Standard, or Premium — balance speed and accuracy for every recording. Process audio, video, or YouTube links.
features_teaser_2_desc: Auto-label who said what, then rename speakers to real names in one tap. Bulk-update across all sections.
features_teaser_3_desc: Click any line to jump to that exact moment. ±10s skip, speed control, and the current section highlights as audio plays.
features_teaser_4_desc: Edit transcript text directly in-place. Fix typos, adjust wording, and save changes without leaving the player view.
features_teaser_5_desc: Executive summaries with overview, key topics with explanations, decisions & findings, and actionable takeaways.
features_teaser_6_desc: Identifies participants, surfaces key decisions, and extracts follow-up items — turning raw transcripts into meeting notes.
features_teaser_7_desc: PDF, TXT, SRT, VTT, and CSV. Toggle plain text, speakers, and timestamps. SRT and VTT for subtitling video content.
features_teaser_8_desc: Free users get one free regeneration. Pro users can regenerate unlimited times for the best possible result.
features_page_heading: Built for speed. Designed for accuracy.
features_page_subtext: Transcription with summarisation, insights, synced playback, inline editing, unlimited regeneration, and subtitle-ready exports — on web and mobile.
features_tiers_desc: Pick Quick for drafts, Standard for everyday meetings, or Premium when every word and speaker label matters. Upload MP3, MP4, YouTube links, or other audio/video sources.
features_tiers_point2: Works with audio files, video, and YouTube URLs
features_tiers_point3: Clear accuracy and time estimates per tier
features_processing_title: See every step as it happens
features_processing_desc: From fetching your media to language detection, speech-to-text, speaker identification, and finalising — Transcribr shows live progress so you never wonder what's happening.
features_processing_point2: Detect errors early and retry if needed
features_processing_point3: Track all jobs from your dashboard
features_summarisation_title: Turn raw transcripts into actionable notes
features_summarisation_desc: Every completed transcript comes with a quick summary plus an executive summary that breaks down key topics with explanations, decisions and findings, and actionable takeaways — ideal for meetings, interviews, and court notes.
features_summarisation_point2: Executive summary: overview, key topics, decisions, takeaways
features_summarisation_point4: Save or share the summary as a PDF
features_playback_desc: Read along while audio plays. Current section highlights automatically. Jump to any timestamped block, scrub with ±10s controls, and adjust playback speed.
features_playback_point3: Current section highlights as audio plays
features_playback_point4: Works with audio, video, and YouTube sources
features_speakers_title: Know who said what — and fix it fast
features_speakers_desc: Automatic speaker labels keep multi-person meetings readable. Rename Speaker 1 and Speaker 2 to real names, edit text directly in-place, and bulk-update across all sections with one tap.
features_speakers_point1: Automatic speaker detection with label assignment
features_speakers_point2: Rename speakers in one tap with modal
features_speakers_point3: Edit transcript text inline without leaving the view
features_speakers_point4: Bulk-update a speaker name across all sections
features_regeneration_desc: Not happy with the result? Free users get one free regeneration. Pro users can regenerate unlimited times for the best possible transcript. No need to re-upload — just tap Regenerate.
features_regeneration_point1: Free users: one regeneration per transcript
features_regeneration_point3: No re-upload needed — regenerates from stored audio
features_export_desc: Download PDF, TXT, SRT, VTT, or CSV. Toggle plain text, speakers, and timestamps. SRT and VTT formats are built for subtitling — drop them straight into your video editor or media player.
features_export_point1: PDF, TXT, SRT, VTT, CSV — five formats
features_export_point2: Free formats available on every plan
features_export_point3: SRT / VTT for video subtitling workflows
features_export_point4: Include speakers and timestamps as needed
features_workspace_desc: A clean dashboard for everything you've transcribed — status chips for Transcribed, Processing, and Failed. Create new transcripts in one tap. Pro tools are ready when you need them.
features_workspace_point1: Status at a glance: Transcribed, Processing, Failed
features_workspace_point2: Create new transcripts in one tap
features_workspace_point3: Web and mobile, same account and workflow
features_workspace_point4: Pro banner with Unlock Pro CTA
features_cross_platform_heading: Same workflow on web, iOS, and beyond
features_cross_platform_subtext: Start a transcript on your phone, finish editing on the web. Your workspace stays in sync so nothing gets stuck on one device.
pricing_subtext: Start free. Upgrade for unlimited minutes and premium accuracy. No hidden fees.
pricing_plan_free_feat4: Export SRT, VTT, PDF, CSV & TXT
pricing_human_heading: Need 100% accuracy? Human-led transcription coming soon
pricing_human_subtext: Professional human review when every word matters — pay-per-request, no subscription required.
cta_heading: Ready to stop typing every word?
cta_subtext: Start free on web or mobile. Upgrade when you need unlimited minutes and premium accuracy.
about_heading: Transcription that keeps up with how you work
about_subtext: Transcribr turns audio and video into accurate, editable text — so professionals spend less time typing and more time on the work that matters.
about_mission_heading: Make every recording useful the moment it ends
about_mission_p1: Meetings, interviews, court notes, and content all start as audio. Most tools stop at a wall of text. We built Transcribr for what comes next: speakers, playback, edits, and exports that fit real jobs — not demos.
about_mission_p2: Whether you're on a phone between sessions or at a desk finishing a draft, the same workspace follows you.
about_quote: Transform your audio files into accurate, searchable transcripts in seconds.
about_quote_caption: Built for meetings, interviews, and content creation — with the polish professionals expect.
about_principle_1_desc: Get usable transcripts in minutes, with tiers that let you trade a little time for higher accuracy when it matters.
about_principle_2_desc: Speaker labels, timestamps, and synced playback turn messy meetings into something you can actually work with.
about_principle_3_desc: Export to the formats you already use — notes, captions, archives — on web and mobile from the same account.
about_audience_heading: Designed for people who live in recordings
about_audience_1_desc: Interviews and field recordings, searchable and citable.
about_audience_2_desc: Standups, customer calls, and planning sessions — captured.
about_audience_3_desc: Lectures, podcasts, and content drafts without the rewatch.
about_audience_4_desc: Court notes and formal audio when structure and export matter.
faq_subtext: Everything you need to know about Transcribr, plans, and how transcription works.
faq_subheading_subtext: Everything you need to know about Transcribr.
faq_q1_q: What file formats and sizes are supported?
faq_q1_a: We support MP3, MP4, WAV, and M4A audio and video files up to 100MB and about 1 hour in duration. You can also paste a YouTube link or a direct URL to a file hosted online. We're continuously expanding format support based on user needs.
faq_q2_a: Processing is typically a fraction of the original length — often in the range of a few minutes for a short meeting. Quick, Standard, and Premium tiers trade speed for accuracy. Exact times depend on audio length, complexity, and current load.
faq_q3_a: Transcribr supports a wide set of languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and many more. Language detection is automatic, or you can specify a language for better accuracy.
faq_q4_a: We aim for industry-leading accuracy on clear audio — often 95–99% depending on tier and conditions. Results vary with audio quality, background noise, accents, and technical terminology. Premium modes prioritize accuracy; Quick is built for speed.
faq_q5_q: What's the difference between Quick, Standard, and Premium?
faq_q5_a: Quick prioritizes turnaround for drafts and rough notes. Standard balances speed and accuracy for most meetings. Premium adds higher accuracy and stronger speaker identification when every word and speaker label matters.
faq_q6_q: Can I edit transcripts and rename speakers?
faq_q6_a: Yes. Transcripts are fully editable. Tap any section to adjust text, and rename default speaker labels (Speaker 1, Speaker 2, etc.) to real names so exports stay clear for your team.
faq_q7_q: How does the free tier work?
faq_q7_a: The free tier is a 7-day free trial that gives you 30 audio minutes or 3 transcripts per day so you can evaluate the product. Upgrade to Weekly or Premium for unlimited minutes, speaker identification, and the full feature set.
faq_q8_q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq_q8_a: Yes. Cancel Premium or Weekly anytime from your account settings. You'll keep access until the end of the current billing period, then your account reverts to the free tier.
faq_q9_q: Is my data secure and private?
faq_q9_a: Yes. Audio and transcripts are encrypted in transit and at rest. We don't sell your content. You own your files and can delete data from your account when you no longer need it. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
faq_q10_a: Export to PDF, TXT, SRT, VTT, and CSV. You can choose plain text only, or include speakers and timestamps depending on your workflow — notes, captions, or archives.
faq_still_subtext: We're happy to help with product questions, billing, or feedback.
support_subtext: We're here to help. Browse the FAQ for quick answers or contact us directly if you need further assistance.
support_contact_text: Send us a message and our team will respond as quickly as possible. For feature requests, use the feedback form instead.
privacy_section1_text: When you use Transcribr, we collect information necessary to provide and improve our service. This may include your email address (for account creation), uploaded audio and video files (for transcription), device information (such as browser type and operating system), and usage data (such as features used and session duration). We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy_section2_text: We use the information we collect to provide transcription services, improve our AI models and service quality, communicate with you about your account and our services, respond to your support requests, ensure the security and integrity of our platform, and comply with legal obligations. Audio files are processed for transcription purposes and are not used for any other purpose without your explicit consent.
privacy_section3_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Audio files and transcripts are encrypted in transit using TLS and at rest using AES-256 encryption. Access to your data is strictly limited to authorized personnel who need it to provide the service.
privacy_section4_text: We may use third-party service providers to help us operate our platform, such as cloud hosting providers and AI transcription engines. These providers are contractually obligated to protect your data and may only use it as instructed by us. We do not share your personal information with advertisers or data brokers.
privacy_section5_text: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights regarding your personal data, including the right to access the personal data we hold about you, request correction of inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, object to or restrict certain processing, data portability, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email address provided at the end of this policy.
privacy_section6_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on our website and, where required, by sending an email notification. Your continued use of Transcribr after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy_section7_text: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@transcribr.org. We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible, typically within 30 days.
terms_section1_text: By accessing or using Transcribr, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the service. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time, and your continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms_section2_text: To access certain features of Transcribr, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and keep your account information updated.
terms_section3_text: Transcribr grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the service for your personal or business use. You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose, upload content that infringes on the intellectual property rights of others, attempt to reverse engineer or disrupt the service, or resell or redistribute the service without authorization.
terms_section4_text: You retain all rights to the audio and video content you upload to Transcribr. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing transcription services. The transcripts generated by our AI remain your property. Transcribr's software, branding, and underlying technology are protected by intellectual property laws.
terms_section5_text: Transcribr offers free and paid subscription tiers. Paid subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis, as described at the time of purchase. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. All fees are non-refundable except as required by applicable law.
terms_section6_text: Transcribr is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. While we strive for high transcription accuracy, we do not guarantee that transcripts will be error-free or that the service will be uninterrupted or completely secure.
terms_section7_text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Transcribr and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability for any claim related to the service shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve months preceding the claim.
terms_section8_text: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at legal@transcribr.org. We aim to respond to all inquiries within a reasonable timeframe.
